etymology: Chinese name suggesting fate and the people
wordplay_note: The people's destiny decided by lottery
card_description: Chien Hsien-min (meaning "Chinese name suggesting fate and the people") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Solar Lottery*. World leader selected by the random Quizmaster mechanism. Name note: The people's destiny decided by lottery. Governance by lottery — democracy taken to its absurd extreme. First appears in *Solar Lottery*.

reference.brief: World leader selected by the random Quizmaster mechanism
reference.etymology: Chinese name suggesting fate and the people
reference.significance: Governance by lottery — democracy taken to its absurd extreme
